title: Add a new asset
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can create a new asset and see it added to the asset list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage assets
Create a new asset with valid details
Verify the new asset appears in the asset list

title: View the dashboard after login
description: Verify an authenticated user lands on the dashboard and sees portfolio KPIs, charts, asset data, and goal progress cards populated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard displays KPI cards, portfolio charts, the asset table, and goal progress cards

title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This test verifies that an existing user can sign in and land on the authenticated dashboard with portfolio data visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify portfolio summary content is displayed

title: Log in and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: This test verifies that a user can sign in successfully and land on the dashboard with the main portfolio overview visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify the main portfolio overview is displayed

title: Create, edit, and delete a financial goal
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can manage a financial goal through the full create-edit-delete lifecycle.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage goals
Create a new goal with valid details
Edit the newly created goal with updated details
Delete the newly created goal
Verify the goal no longer appears in the goal list

title: Complete account registration
description: This test verifies that a new user can register with valid details and reach the dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify portfolio summary content is displayed

title: Create a new financial goal
description: Verify a user can add a financial goal and see a new goal card with progress information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /goals
Open the add goal form
Fill in the goal name with a unique test value
Fill in the goal target amount with a valid number
Fill in the goal target date with a valid date
Submit the goal form
Verify the new goal card is displayed with progress information

title: Delete an asset from the asset list
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can delete an asset and confirm it is removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage assets
Delete an existing asset
Verify the deleted asset no longer appears in the asset list

title: Edit an existing asset
description: Verify a user can open an existing asset, update its details, and see the changes reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /assets
Open an asset menu
Choose to edit the asset
Update the asset details with valid values
Submit the asset form
Verify the updated asset details are reflected in the asset list

title: Edit an asset and keep it visible in search and filters
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can edit an existing asset and then find it through asset search, filtering, and sorting.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage assets
Edit an existing asset with updated details
Search for the edited asset
Filter assets by category
Sort the asset table
Verify the edited asset remains visible in the asset table

title: Delete an asset
description: Verify a user can delete an existing asset from the assets page and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /assets
Open an asset menu

Confirm deletion
Verify the asset no longer appears in the asset list

title: Use the projections page after logging in

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Verify the 10-year area chart is displayed

title: Review dashboard KPIs and charts
